label: Dataprogrammering, datakonsultverksamhet o.d.
description: Branschspecifik scaffold för bolag inom dataprogrammering och datakonsultverksamhet. Strukturen prioriterar tydlig beskrivning av tjänster, teknikkompetens, case, prissättning/modeller och kontakt för uppdrag eller registrering.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende genom case, team och arbetssätt
visa teknisk spets utan generiska konsultfloskler

routes.purpose: Positionera bolaget, förklara vad ni bygger eller levererar och leda besökaren vidare till kontakt eller registrering.
Beskriva kärntjänster, teknikområden och typiska leveranser på ett konkret sätt.
Visa genomförda uppdrag, produktbyggen eller resultat som hjälper besökaren att förstå kompetens och arbetssätt.
Förklara prismodeller, paket eller hur offert och upplägg fungerar när fasta priser saknas.
Bygga förtroende genom team, bakgrund, arbetssätt och syn på kvalitet, säkerhet och samarbete.
Göra det enkelt att starta dialog, boka möte, skicka förfrågan eller registrera sig.

routes.when: when the company publishes technical insights, product updates or news regularly
when the company is actively recruiting developers, consultants or product roles
when the sales process benefits from answering common questions about scope, pricing, security or delivery

sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what the company builds or delivers, for whom, and include a primary CTA.
Service-summary must describe concrete offer areas such as system development, integrations, cloud, product development or consulting.
Case-highlights should appear before the final CTA when case material exists.
Trust-proof must use real signals such as named clients, certifications if actually held, security practices or testimonials; it must not invent numbers or badges.
Sections should avoid repeating the same technical claims without adding new information.
Services-intro must connect the company's competence to real customer needs or business problems.
Service-list items must be specific about scope, examples or outcomes, not only broad labels like 'IT solutions'.
Process-overview should explain how projects, sprints, advisory work or maintenance are delivered.
If pricing-summary is shown here, it should explain pricing logic clearly without pretending fixed prices exist for custom development.
Each case should describe client type or context, the challenge, what was built or improved, and the outcome if known.
Case-list must not expose confidential details; anonymized cases are acceptable when needed.
Testimonials should support the cases and not duplicate the same proof statements verbatim.
Pricing-intro must explain whether the company works with fixed packages, retainers, hourly rates, discovery phases or custom quotes.
Pricing-models must be transparent about what affects scope and cost.
If package-list is used, packages must reflect realistic offerings such as audit, workshop, MVP sprint or support plan.
About-story must be specific about background, competence or focus areas, not generic passion statements.
Team should highlight relevant roles or expertise areas when available.
Working-method should describe collaboration, communication, documentation or quality practices in a concrete way.
Contact-info must include real contact channels such as email and any available phone or office details.
Contact-form should fit lead capture for consulting or product inquiries, for example project type, timeline or message.
The page must make the next step clear, such as booking a meeting, sending a request or registering interest.

mustPass: Page set reflects software development and consulting needs with services, cases and optional pricing.
All default routes have matching sectionsPerRoute entries.
Purposes and rules avoid invented trust claims or fake metrics.
Swedish route paths are lowercase and start with '/'.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic local-service structure without space for case studies or technical competence.
Vague service copy that says little more than 'digital solutions'.
Pricing promises that imply fixed costs for undefined custom projects.
Made-up certifications, client logos or security claims.
Too many routes for very small firms that only need a compact presence.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Dataprogrammering, systemutveckling, mjukvarukonsult, teknikkonsult, SaaS, produktutveckling, integrationer, moln, apputveckling, webbutveckling, utvecklingsteam, techbolag, konsultbolag med tjänster, case, priser, team och kontakt.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold for companies that build software, deliver development consulting, product engineering or technical advisory services.
Strong fit when the business needs to explain services, technologies, delivery model and cases.
Can serve both consultancy-led firms and product-oriented tech companies if contact or registration is the main conversion.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
